briefdescription.para: Lower Threshold.
Upper Threshold.
This typedef defines Threshold types.

sectiondef.header: This array contains the names of the supplies

briefdescription.para: Names of the supplies enabled in the design.
Current Value for temperature (for production silicon only) and supply.
Minimum Value reached since reset.
Maximum Value reached since reset.
Minimum value reached for a temperature since last VRef.
Maximum value reached for a temperature since last VRef.
This typedef defines value types for voltage readings.
1V unipolar fmt
2V unipolar fmt
4V unipolar fmt
1V bipolar fmt
This typedef defines types of supply values.
< prevent circular inclusions
This macro returns the XSYSMONPSV_NEW_ALARMn_MASK for a configured supply.

simplesect.para: A 32 bit mask to be used for configuring interrupts

briefdescription.para: Converts raw AdcData into Voltage value.

simplesect.para: The Voltage in volts.

briefdescription.para: Converts raw AdcData into Voltage value.

parameterdescription.para: Type of supply: Type = 0, Unipolar Type = 1, Bipolar

simplesect.para: The Voltage in Raw ADC format.

briefdescription.para: Converts the fixed point to degree celsius.

simplesect.para: The Temperature in degree celsisus.

briefdescription.para: Converts the floating point to Fixed Q8.7 format.

simplesect.para: Temperature value in fixed Q8.7 format.

briefdescription.para: Initializes XSysMonPsv device/instance.

detaileddescription.para: This function must be called prior to using the System Monitor device.

parameterdescription.para: Points to the XSysMonPsv device configuration structure.

simplesect.para: The user needs to first call the XSysMonPsv_LookupConfig() API which returns the Configuration structure pointer which is passed as a parameter to the XSysMonPsv_CfgInitialize() API.

briefdescription.para: Resets the SystemMonitor.

simplesect.para: None.

briefdescription.para: Gates the register outputs.

parameterdescription.para: Flag to enable or disable gate registers.

simplesect.para: None.

briefdescription.para: Sets the PMBus address for the System Monitor.

parameterdescription.para: Value at which the Sysmon will be addressed on the PMBus.

simplesect.para: None.

briefdescription.para: Enables/disbles the PMBus on the System Monitor.

parameterdescription.para: Value which enables or disables the PMBus.

simplesect.para: None.
If Enable = 0, PMBus lines will be in tristate. If Enable = 1, PMBus lines will be active.

briefdescription.para: Restricts or de-restrict all PMBs commands.

parameterdescription.para: Value which restrics or de-restrict the PMBus commands.

simplesect.para: None.
If Enable = 0, PMBus commands are disabled. If Enable = 1, PMBus commands are enabled.

briefdescription.para: Selects I2C or PMBus interface to which traffic from SMBus is routed.

parameterdescription.para: Value which determies where the SMBus traffic gets routed to.

simplesect.para: None.
If Interface = 1, I2C command interface is enabled. If Interface = 0, PMBus command interface is enabled.

briefdescription.para: Resets the Min and Max values of supplies and temperature to negative and positive saturation respectively.

parameterdescription.para: Resets the MIN and MAX values reached by the internal supplies since the last reset.
Resets the MIN and MAX values reached by the device since the last reset.

simplesect.para: None.

briefdescription.para: Returns the device temperature threshold for min and max values in signed Q8.7 format.

parameterdescription.para: Enum which indicates the type of threshold.

simplesect.para: Device Temperature threshold in signed Q8.7 format.
To get the value in Deg Celsius, use XSysMonPsv_FixedToFloat.

briefdescription.para: Sets Device Temperature Threshold values.

parameterdescription.para: Enum which indicates the type of threshold.

simplesect.para: None.
Use XSysMonPsv_FloatToFixed to get the raw ADC value.

briefdescription.para: Returns the OT temperature threshold for min and max values in signed Q8.7 format.

parameterdescription.para: Enum which indicates the type of threshold

simplesect.para: OT Temperature threshold in signed Q8.7 format.

briefdescription.para: Sets OT Temperature Threshold values.

parameterdescription.para: Enum which indicates the type of threshold.

simplesect.para: None.
Use XSysMonPsv_FloatToFixed to get the raw ADC value.

briefdescription.para: Returns the temperature values for the device in signed Q8.7 format.

parameterdescription.para: Enum which indicates the type of temperature value to be read.

simplesect.para: Temperature value requested. XSYSMONPSV_INVALID if invalid value requested.

XSYSMONPSV_VAL_VREF_MIN and XSYSMONPSV_VAL_VREF_MAX are only supported for ES1 silicon to get min and max temperature values. XSYSMONPSV_VAL_VREF_MIN and XSYSMONPSV_VAL_VREF_MAX are not supported on production silicon. Use XSYSMONPSV_VAL to get the current temperature value on production silicon. XSYSMONPSV_VAL is not supported on ES1 silicon.

briefdescription.para: Reads the raw value for Supply Threshold.

parameterdescription.para: Enum which indicates the desired supply to be read.
Enum which indicates the type of threshold.

simplesect.para: The raw Upper or Lower threshold of the supply XSYSMONPSV_INVALID if the supply hasn't been configured.

briefdescription.para: Reads the raw supply value for requested.

parameterdescription.para: Enum which indicates the desired supply to be read.
Type of reading for the supply.

simplesect.para: The raw values for min, max or the prevailing supply value. Invalid if the supply is not configured.

briefdescription.para: Checks if new data is available for a supply.

parameterdescription.para: Enum which indicates the desired supply.

simplesect.para: True if new data available. False if new data is not available. Invalid if the supply is not configured.
None.

briefdescription.para: Checks if the supply value has exceeded the set threshold values.

parameterdescription.para: Enum which indicates the desired supply.

simplesect.para: True if new data available. False if new data is not available. Invalid if the supply is not configured.

briefdescription.para: Sets the raw value for upper supply threshold.

parameterdescription.para: Enum which indicates the desired supply to be configured

simplesect.para: XSYSMONPSV_INVALID if the Supply hasn't been configured XST_SUCCESS otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Sets the raw value for Lower Supply Threshold.

parameterdescription.para: Enum which indicates the desired supply to be configured.

simplesect.para: XSYSMONPSV_INVALID if the Supply hasn't been configured XST_SUCCESS otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Sets the alarm mode for temperature alarms.

parameterdescription.para: Sets the Hysteresis or window mode. Mode = 1 Hysteresis Mode Mode = 0 Window Mode

simplesect.para: None.

briefdescription.para: Sets the alarm mode for OT alarm.

parameterdescription.para: Sets the Hysteresis or Window mode. Mode = XSYSMONPSV_HYSTERESIS Hysteresis Mode Mode = XSYSMONPSV_WINDOW Window Mode

simplesect.para: None.

briefdescription.para: Reads the current supply Alarm Configuration.

parameterdescription.para: Supply for which configuration is to be read.

simplesect.para: TRUE if enabled. FALSE if disabled. XSYSMONPSV_INVALID if invalid SupplyValue.

briefdescription.para: Sets the Alarm configuration for a supply.

parameterdescription.para: Supply for which config is to be set.
Alarm config value. XSYSMONPSV_ENABLE to enable XSYSMONPSV_DISABLE to disable

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS if successful. XSYSMONPSV_INVALID if invalid SupplyValue.

briefdescription.para: Reads the temperature and returns value in degree celsius.
Reads the temperature and returns value in raw format.
Reads the temperature of each satellite in degree celsius.
Reads the temperature of each satellite in raw format.
Sets the temperature upper threshold.
Sets the temperature lower threshold.
Gets the temperature upper threshold.

parameterdescription.para: Upper threshold value to be read.

briefdescription.para: Gets the temperature lower threshold.

parameterdescription.para: lower threshold value to be read.

briefdescription.para: Reads the voltage for the supply.
Reads the voltage for the supply in raw.
Sets the upper threshold voltage for the supply.
Sets loser threshold voltage for the supply.
Gets the upper threshold voltage for the supply.
Gets the lower threshold voltage for the supply.
Enables or Disables temperature satellites averaging.

parameterdescription.para: Temperature Satellite id, indexed from 1 to 64.

simplesect.para: None

briefdescription.para: Sets temperature satellites average sampling rate value.

parameterdescription.para: Average Sampling Rate Value to be set.

simplesect.para: None

briefdescription.para: Gets temperature satellites average sampling rate value.

parameterdescription.para: Average Sampling Rate Value to be read.

briefdescription.para: Enables or Disables voltage supplies averaging.
Sets voltage supplies average sampling rate value.

parameterdescription.para: Average Sampling Rate Value to be set.

simplesect.para: None

briefdescription.para: Gets voltage supplies average sampling rate value.

parameterdescription.para: Average Sampling Rate Value to be read.

briefdescription.para: Enables the specified interrupts in the device.

parameterdescription.para: 32 bit-mask of the interrupts to be enabled. Bit positions of 1 will be enabled. Bit positions of 0 will keep the previous setting. This mask is formed by OR'ing XSYSMONPSV_IER_* bits defined in xsysmonpsv_hw.h.
Interrupt enable register to be used.

simplesect.para: None.

briefdescription.para: Disables the specified interrupts in the device.

parameterdescription.para: 32 bit-mask of the interrupts to be enabled. Bit positions of 1 will be disabled. Bit positions of 0 will keep the previous setting. This mask is formed by OR'ing XSYSMONPSV_IDR_* bits defined in xsysmonpsv_hw.h.
Interrupt disable register to be used.

simplesect.para: None.

briefdescription.para: Returns the enabled interrupts read from the Interrupt Mask Register (IMR).

detaileddescription.para: Use the XSYSMONPSV_IMR0_* and XSYSMONPSV_IMR1_* constants defined in xsysmonpsv_hw.h to interpret the returned value.

parameterdescription.para: Interrupt enable register to be used

simplesect.para: A 32-bit value representing the contents of the Interrupt Mask Registers.

briefdescription.para: Returns the interrupt status read from Interrupt Status Register(ISR).

detaileddescription.para: Use the XSYSMONPSV_ISR* constants defined in xsysmonpsv_hw.h to interpret the returned value.

simplesect.para: A 32-bit value representing the contents of the Interrupt Status Register (ISR).

briefdescription.para: Clears the specified interrupts in the Interrupt Status Register (ISR).

parameterdescription.para: 32 bit-mask of the interrupts to be cleared. Bit positions of 1 will be cleared. Bit positions of 0 will not change the previous interrupt status.*

simplesect.para: None.

briefdescription.para: Sets a supply as a source new data interrupt.

parameterdescription.para: 32 bit Mask for NEW_DATA_n fields in the interrupt registers

simplesect.para: None.

briefdescription.para: Looks for the device configuration based on the unique device ID.

detaileddescription.para: The table XSysmonPsu_ConfigTable[] contains the configuration information for each device in the system.

simplesect.para: A pointer to the configuration table entry corresponding to the given device, or NULL if no match is found.
